understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem `+` by navigating the grid using horizontal movement and automatic gravity-based falling, while using clicks to remove obstacles without landing on spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x-position then triggers automatic falling in current gravity direction (DOWN toward smaller y or UP toward larger y) until landing on solid tile; CLICK removes breakable `x` tiles at target position; spikes end run immediately; limited steps per attempt with gravity state and landing previews available each turn.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem `+` by navigating the grid using horizontal movement and automatic gravity-based falling, while using clicks to remove obstacles without landing on spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x-position then triggers automatic falling in current gravity direction (DOWN toward smaller y or UP toward larger y) until landing on solid tile; CLICK removes breakable `x` tiles at target position; spikes end run immediately; limited steps per attempt with gravity state and landing previews available each turn.
